qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t0.oi_tarea as oi_tarea FROM PRY02_TAREAS as t0 WHERE t0.oi_proyecto = {#PARAM:@id} ORDER BY oi_tarea asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT t0.oi_proyecto as id FROM PRY01_PROYECTOS as t0 WHERE t0.oi_proyecto_parent = {#PARAM:@id}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT t0.oi_tarea as oi_tarea, t0.c_tarea as c_tarea, t0.d_tarea as d_tarea, t0.f_inicio_est as f_inicio_est, t0.f_fin_est as f_fin_est, t0.f_inicio as f_inicio, t0.f_fin as f_fin, t0.e_estimado as e_estimado, t0.f_limite as f_limite, t0.e_prioridad as e_prioridad, t0.c_estado as c_estado, t0.c_tarea as CODE, t0.d_tarea as TEXT, t0.oi_proyecto as oi_proyecto, t0.oi_recurso as oi_recurso, t0.oi_pry_imputa as oi_pry_imputa, t0.oi_unidad_tiempo as oi_unidad_tiempo, t0.c_clasificacion FROM PRY02_TAREAS as t0, PRY05_RECURSOS as re, PER01_PERSONAL as pe JOIN t0.oi_recurso INNER re.oi_recurso, re.oi_personal INNER pe.oi_personal WHERE
t0.oi_proyecto = {#PARAM:@id} ORDER BY oi_tarea asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT t0.oi_proyecto as id FROM PRY01_PROYECTOS as t0 WHERE t0.oi_proyecto_parent = {#PARAM:@id}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.c_tarea as c_tarea FROM PRY02_TAREAS as t WHERE t.oi_proyecto={#PARAM:@ID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT P.oi_personal, R.oi_recurso FROM PER01_PERSONAL as P, PRY05_RECURSOS as R JOIN P.oi_personal inner R.oi_personal WHERE P.oi_usuario_sistema = {#PROXY:@ETTY} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_tarea as oi_tarea FROM PRY02_TAREAS as t0 ORDER BY oi_tarea asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_tarea as oi_tarea FROM PRY02_TAREAS as t0 ORDER BY oi_tarea asc')/ROWS/ROW
